user.title: Home Assistant Dashboard Studio
user.description: Installs the dashboard studio as a sidebar panel. After setup, **Dashboard Studio** appears in the sidebar — no configuration.yaml entry required.

abort.already_configured: Home Assistant Dashboard Studio is already configured.

init.title: Restore default dashboard
init.description:
Deletes all saved dashboard files for **every user** and loads the bundled default showcase the next time the panel is opened.

**Note:** Unsaved editor changes are lost. Reload the panel after resetting (F5).

data.confirm_reset: Yes, delete saved dashboard and restore default
